response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with a strong background in high-throughput distributed systems and a demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators perfectly aligns with the required AI-native engineering mindset. Although he lacks the mandatory Python expertise, his deep architectural knowledge and proficiency in TypeScript make him a highly competitive candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship background with extensive experience in TDD, CI/CD, and agile practices.
concerns: Does not list Python as a skill, which is a must-have technical requirement for the role.
His most recent Staff role involving AI agents is very recent, making the depth of this specific tenure unclear.
No explicit mention of leading incident response or participating in out-of-hours on-call rotations.
